name: Proto-Chadic (family node)
notes: STRUCTURAL ANCESTRY NODE (not a modelled G2P target). Proto-Chadic is the reconstructed ancestor of the Chadic branch of Afroasiatic, the largest member of which is Hausa. It exists here only so the ancestry / phylogenetic-distance metrics of the modern varieties that reference it have a node to resolve to; NO phonology is claimed or reconstructed and the minimal grapheme set is a placeholder (afa.json / trk.json stub pattern).

sources.author: Newman, P.
sources.title: Chadic classification and reconstructions
sources.notes: Reference for Chadic classification (structural node only).
